```{=html}
<script>
// Shared behaviour for the filterable tables (packages, tutorials).
// Wrap controls and table in .filter-table-wrap, give each row a
// data-category, and this handles search and category filtering.
document.querySelectorAll('.filter-table-wrap').forEach(function (wrap) {
  const search = wrap.querySelector('.filter-search');
  const buttons = Array.from(wrap.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn'));
  const rows = Array.from(wrap.querySelectorAll('tbody tr'));
  const empty = wrap.querySelector('.filter-empty');
  let category = 'all';

  function apply() {
    const query = search ? search.value.trim().toLowerCase() : '';
    let shown = 0;
    rows.forEach(function (row) {
      const inCategory = category === 'all' || row.dataset.category === category;
      const matches = query === '' || row.textContent.toLowerCase().includes(query);
      const show = inCategory && matches;
      row.hidden = !show;
      if (show) shown++;
    });
    if (empty) empty.hidden = shown !== 0;
  }

  if (search) search.addEventListener('input', apply);
  buttons.forEach(function (button) {
    button.addEventListener('click', function () {
      buttons.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('is-active'));
      button.classList.add('is-active');
      category = button.dataset.category;
      apply();
    });
  });
});
</script>
```
